title: MLX ASR model download and local evaluation

follow_ups.title: Integrate Qwen3-ASR 1.7B MLX into a local realtime session prototype
follow_ups.reason: The selected backend direction has strong Mac-local file-level quality and file/token streaming probes, but microphone-style timed PCM chunks, partial stability, cancellation, final correction, model reuse, and memory across repeated sessions remain unproven.

follow_ups.title: Make AMD Windows model downloads durable without a foreground SSH session
follow_ups.reason: The AMD transfer path is validated through a foreground PowerShell snapshot command, but detached Windows OpenSSH background startup remained unreliable and should be fixed before larger unattended downloads.
